vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-655: test(prd-pipeline): add docs/prd-pipeline-test-marker.md

narratives.Problem: Need an end-to-end smoke test that the planning → work → review → test → merge pipeline correctly handles PRD/STATE.md/vBRIEF artifacts in canonical lowercase locations after the recent PRD-location refactor.
narratives.Proposal: Add a single trivial marker file at docs/prd-pipeline-test-marker.md. The value is in exercising the pipeline, not in the file content itself. After merge, verify artifacts land in docs/prds/completed/pan-655/ and ~/.panopticon/archives/pan-655/.

narrative.Action: Create docs/prd-pipeline-test-marker.md with the exact marker content specified in the issue body. No other files should be modified.

subItems.title: File contains the heading '# PRD Pipeline Test Marker' and the explanatory text from the issue body
No other files in the repo are modified by this change
npm run typecheck, npm run lint, and npm test all pass
